authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model explicitly identified the conflict (D1/D3: 6 months vs D2: 0 months) and resolved it by pointing to the executed-lease outcome described in D2, including quoting D2’s statement that the final executed lease has 0 months free rent. Its choice is based on document status/recency (executed terms supersede LOI/budget), not deference to a person’s title alone.
